title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Mastery Check
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a skill test and release harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.
Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.
starterFiles.config:

# Record scope, triggers, permissions, tests, and maintenance evidence.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Instruction Tests evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Instruction Tests assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: agent ext skill testing. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Instruction Tests, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a skill test and release harness.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A readable SKILL.md guarantees correct execution. This fails the Instruction Tests contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Anthropic Claude Code MCP (Current 2026-07-13) — Controls Claude Code MCP transports, scopes, commands, trust prompts, resources, and prompts.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.

Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Usage Feedback applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The decision applies Instruction Tests to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Instruction Tests.
